---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement

Describe the research workflow problem or limitation you are hitting. What are you trying to do that the current system does not support well?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you would like to happen. Be specific about the interface: new CLI command, MCP tool, primitive, or configuration option.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds or alternative approaches have you tried?

## Additional context

Links to papers, prior art, or related features that inform the request.
